Title: Authorize.Net - Complete Payment Flow [DEPRECATED — superseded by PAY-AN-010]
Preconditions:
[PRE:CLEAR_SESSION]
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
- Logged in as registered user
- Cart has at least one item
- Authorize.Net payment processor configured and active
- Authorize.Net test credentials set in environment
- DEPRECATED: This case encoded the old redirect-to-/checkout/payment flow. VCST-5162 (AllowCartPayment=true) changes Authorize.Net to render inline on /cart (same as CyberSource/Skyflow). Superseded by PAY-AN-010 (happy path cart-embedded). Do not execute.
Test_Data: FRONT_URL={{FRONT_URL}}, USER_EMAIL={{USER_EMAIL}}, USER_PASSWORD={{USER_PASSWORD}}, TEST_CARD_NUMBER={{TEST_CARD_NUMBER}}, TEST_CARD_EXP={{TEST_CARD_EXP}}, TEST_CARD_CVV={{TEST_CARD_CVV}}
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] Select Authorize.Net as payment method if not pre-selected
[ACT] Click 'Place Order' — this redirects to the Authorize.Net payment form at {{FRONT_URL}}/checkout/payment
[WAIT] Wait for {{FRONT_URL}}/checkout/payment to load with Authorize.Net payment form
[ACT] Fill 'Card Number' with '{{TEST_CARD_NUMBER}}'
[ACT] Fill 'Expiry Date' with '{{TEST_CARD_EXP}}'
[ACT] Fill 'CVV' with '{{TEST_CARD_CVV}}'
[ACT] Fill 'Cardholder Name' with a test name
[ACT] Click 'Place Order' or 'Submit Payment'
[WAIT] Wait for payment authorization response
Assertions:
[NAV] After clicking 'Place Order' from cart user is redirected to {{FRONT_URL}}/checkout/payment
[DOM] Payment form renders correctly on /checkout/payment page
[NAV] After successful payment user navigated to order confirmation page
[STATE] Order confirmation displays order number
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] createOrderFromCart GraphQL mutation errors[] is empty
[ADMIN] Order appears in admin with Authorize.Net payment method recorded
[NETWORK] Payment request sent to Authorize.Net endpoint; no raw card data in storefront API requests
Failure_Signals: No redirect to /checkout/payment after clicking Place Order from cart; payment form does not load; order confirmation not reached; mutation returns errors[]
References: google-analytics; STALE: VCST-5162 AllowCartPayment=true — redirects to /checkout/payment no longer expected; superseded by PAY-AN-010

Title: Authorize.Net - Invalid Card Number Validation [DEPRECATED — superseded by PAY-AN-012]
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
- Logged in as registered user
- Cart has at least one item
- Authorize.Net payment form loaded at {{FRONT_URL}}/checkout/payment (reached by clicking Place Order from cart)
- DEPRECATED: Encoded old /checkout/payment redirect path. VCST-5162: form now inline on /cart. Superseded by PAY-AN-012 (invalid card, cart-embedded). Do not execute.
Test_Data: FRONT_URL={{FRONT_URL}}, USER_EMAIL={{USER_EMAIL}}, USER_PASSWORD={{USER_PASSWORD}}
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart; click 'Place Order' to reach Authorize.Net payment form at {{FRONT_URL}}/checkout/payment
[WAIT] Wait for payment form to load
[ACT] Fill 'Card Number' with '@td(CYBERSOURCE_INVALID.number)' (fails Luhn check)
[ACT] Fill 'Expiry Date' with a valid future date; fill 'CVV' with a valid 3-digit value
[ACT] Attempt to submit payment
[ASSERT] Validation error appears on 'Card Number' field
[ASSERT] Form does not submit with invalid card number
Assertions:
[DOM] 'Card Number' field shows validation error indicating invalid card
[STATE] Payment submission blocked for Luhn-failing card number
[NAV] User remains on {{FRONT_URL}}/checkout/payment
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] No createOrderFromCart GraphQL mutation fired or mutation returns errors[]
[CONSOLE] No unhandled JS exceptions
Failure_Signals: Invalid card number accepted without error; form submits and reaches payment processor with known-bad card; user navigated away from /checkout/payment unexpectedly
References: Coverage Gap Analysis; STALE: VCST-5162 — old /checkout/payment path; superseded by PAY-AN-012

Title: Datatrans - Invalid OTP Recovery
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
- Logged in as registered user
- Cart has at least one item added
- Datatrans payment processor configured and active
Test_Data: FRONT_URL={{FRONT_URL}}, USER_EMAIL={{USER_EMAIL}}, USER_PASSWORD={{USER_PASSWORD}}, DT_CARD={{DATATRANCE_MASTERCARD}}, DT_EXP={{DATATRANCE_EXPIRY}}, DT_CVV={{DATATRANCE_CVV}}, DT_OTP={{DATATRANCE_OTP}}
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart; select Datatrans payment method if not pre-selected
[ACT] Click 'Place Order' to initiate Datatrans redirect to {{FRONT_URL}}/checkout/payment
[WAIT] Wait for Datatrans payment form to load
[ACT] Enter card number '{{DATATRANCE_MASTERCARD}}', expiry '{{DATATRANCE_EXPIRY}}', CVV '{{DATATRANCE_CVV}}' in Datatrans form and submit
[WAIT] Wait for Datatrans OTP prompt to appear
[ACT] At OTP input: fill OTP field with '000000' (intentionally incorrect)
[ACT] Submit the incorrect OTP
[WAIT] Wait for Datatrans error response
[ASSERT] Error message displayed indicating invalid OTP
[ASSERT] Retry mechanism available — OTP field still accessible or re-prompted
[ACT] Fill OTP field with the correct value from DATATRANCE_OTP environment variable
[ACT] Submit the correct OTP
[WAIT] Wait for return redirect to storefront
[ASSERT] Payment succeeds; user reaches order confirmation
Assertions:
[DOM] Error message shown after incorrect OTP submission
[STATE] Retry mechanism available after invalid OTP (field not permanently locked)
[NAV] Correct OTP leads to successful return to storefront
[STATE] Only one order created — no duplicate from the failed first OTP attempt
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] createOrderFromCart GraphQL mutation errors[] is empty on final successful submission
[ADMIN] Single order in admin — no duplicate orders from retry scenario
Failure_Signals: No error shown for incorrect OTP; OTP field locked without retry option; duplicate orders created from retry; correct OTP rejected after previous incorrect attempt
References: VCST-4893

Title: Skyflow - Complete Payment Flow (Cart-Embedded, New Card)
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
- Logged in as registered user
- Cart has at least one item
- Skyflow payment processor configured with AllowCartPayment=true (vc-module-skyflow 3.1002.0+)
- NOTE: If user has saved Skyflow cards, a 'Select credit card' dropdown renders first. In that case, select 'Add new card' from the dropdown to reveal the new-card iframe fields.
Test_Data: FRONT_URL={{FRONT_URL}}, USER_EMAIL={{USER_EMAIL}}, USER_PASSWORD={{USER_PASSWORD}}, skyflow_card=@td(SKYFLOW_MC.number), skyflow_exp=@td(SKYFLOW_MC.expiry), skyflow_cvv=@td(SKYFLOW_MC.cvv)
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[WAIT] Wait for Skyflow payment section to render inline on the cart page (no redirect)
[ACT] Select 'Bank card (Skyflow)' payment method if not pre-selected
[ACT] If a 'Select credit card' dropdown is present (user has saved cards), select 'Add new card' from the dropdown
[WAIT] Wait for Skyflow iframe fields to render: 'Card number', 'Cardholder name', 'Expiration date' (MM / YY), 'Security code'
[ASSERT] All four Skyflow iframe fields are visible on the cart page
[ACT] Fill 'Card number' iframe field with '@td(SKYFLOW_MC.number)'
[ACT] Fill 'Cardholder name' field with '@td(SKYFLOW_MC.cardholder)'
[ACT] Fill 'Expiration date' iframe field with '@td(SKYFLOW_MC.expiry)' (MM / YY format)
[ACT] Fill 'Security code' iframe field with '@td(SKYFLOW_MC.cvv)'
[ASSERT] 'Place order' button becomes enabled after all fields are valid
[ACT] Click 'Place order'
[WAIT] Wait for payment processing and order confirmation
Assertions:
[STATE] Skyflow payment form renders INLINE on /cart — NO redirect to /checkout/payment occurs before clicking 'Place order'
[NAV] After successful payment user is navigated to order confirmation page or /checkout/completed
[DOM] Order confirmation shows order number
[STATE] Card data tokenized by Skyflow — raw PAN not transmitted in any network request
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] createOrderFromCart GraphQL mutation errors[] is empty
[NETWORK] Raw Mastercard PAN '@td(SKYFLOW_MC.number)' absent from all storefront network payloads (Skyflow tokenized)
[ADMIN] Order in admin with Skyflow payment method and tokenized card reference
[API] cart availablePaymentMethods includes SkyflowPaymentMethod with allowCartPayment=true
Failure_Signals: Skyflow form not rendered inline on /cart; clicking 'Place order' triggers redirect to /checkout/payment instead of submitting inline; payment tokenization fails; order confirmation not reached
References: config.js; Synced: VCST-5009 PR#2308+PR#23 (2026-06-04)

Title: Payment Method Switch - Form Resets and Processor Unregisters When Switching
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]

- CyberSource and Skyflow payment processors both enabled on store
- CyberSource payment form visible on {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
Test_Data: FRONT_URL={{FRONT_URL}}, USER_EMAIL={{USER_EMAIL}}, USER_PASSWORD={{USER_PASSWORD}}, TEST_CARD_NUMBER=@td(CYBERSOURCE_VISA.number), TEST_CARD_EXP=@td(CYBERSOURCE_VISA.expiry), TEST_CARD_CVV=@td(CYBERSOURCE_VISA.cvv), sky_card=@td(SKYFLOW_MC.number), sky_exp=@td(SKYFLOW_MC.expiry), sky_cvv=@td(SKYFLOW_MC.cvv)
Steps:
--- Switch direction 1: CyberSource → Skyflow ---
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart with fresh cart; confirm both CyberSource and Skyflow options visible
[ACT] Select 'Bank card (CyberSource)' payment method
[WAIT] Wait for CyberSource Flex Microform iframe fields to render
[ACT] Fill 'Card Number' with '@td(CYBERSOURCE_VISA.number)'; fill 'Cardholder Name' with '@td(CYBERSOURCE_VISA.cardholder)'; fill 'Expiry Date' with '@td(CYBERSOURCE_VISA.expiry)'; fill 'CVV' with '@td(CYBERSOURCE_VISA.cvv)'
[ASSERT] All four CyberSource fields contain entered data
[ACT] Switch to 'Bank card (Skyflow)'
[WAIT] Wait for Skyflow inline form to render
[ASSERT] Skyflow iframe fields are visible; CyberSource form fields are hidden or removed from DOM
[ASSERT] 'Place order' button is DISABLED (CyberSource onUnmounted called setCardDataInvalid; Skyflow not yet filled)
[ASSERT] No stale CyberSource card data persisted in DOM
--- Switch direction 2: Skyflow → CyberSource (fresh cart) ---
[PRE:RESET_CART]
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart with fresh cart
[ACT] Select 'Bank card (Skyflow)'
[WAIT] Wait for Skyflow inline form to render on /cart
[ACT] Fill '@td(SKYFLOW_MC.number)' in Skyflow card field; fill '@td(SKYFLOW_MC.expiry)' and '@td(SKYFLOW_MC.cvv)'
[ACT] Switch to 'Bank card (CyberSource)'
[WAIT] Wait for CyberSource form to render
[ASSERT] CyberSource Flex Microform iframe fields are visible; Skyflow form absent from DOM
[ASSERT] CyberSource fields are empty — no Skyflow card data leaked
[ASSERT] 'Place order' button is DISABLED (Skyflow onUnmounted called setCardDataInvalid; CyberSource not yet filled)
Assertions:
[DOM] After CS→Skyflow switch: Skyflow form renders; CyberSource form absent; no stale CS data
[STATE] After CS→Skyflow switch: 'Place order' button disabled until Skyflow fields filled (onUnmounted cleanup fired)
[DOM] After Skyflow→CS switch: CyberSource form renders; Skyflow form absent; no stale Skyflow data
[STATE] After Skyflow→CS switch: 'Place order' button disabled until CS fields filled (onUnmounted cleanup fired)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] No JS errors during either switch direction — no 'processor already registered' errors
[NETWORK] No payment tokenization request fired when switching payment methods
[CONSOLE] No TypeError on stale processor reference after unmount
Failure_Signals: Stale card data persists in DOM after switching away; 'Place order' button stays enabled after switch (onUnmounted setCardDataInvalid not called — processor cleanup regression); JS error on switch; wrong payment form shown for selected method

[WAIT] Wait for order processing to complete and order confirmation to load

Title: Skyflow ↔ CyberSource Switch - onUnmounted Processor Cleanup (No Stale Processor)
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]

- Fresh cart with ≥1 item for each switch direction (IMPORTANT: start from fresh cart per direction — cart-resolver appends payment rows on switch; orphaned rows cause false state)
- CyberSource and Skyflow payment processors both enabled

Steps:
--- Switch direction 1: Skyflow → CyberSource (fresh cart) ---
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart with fresh cart
[WAIT] Wait for payment methods section to render
[ACT] Select 'Bank card (Skyflow)' payment method
[WAIT] Wait for Skyflow iframe fields to render inline on cart page
[ASSERT] Skyflow iframe fields are visible
[ACT] Enter '@td(SKYFLOW_MC.number)' in Skyflow card number field (partial entry to set form state)
[ACT] Switch to 'Bank card (CyberSource)' payment method
[WAIT] Wait for CyberSource Flex Microform to render
[ASSERT] CyberSource iframe fields are visible
[ASSERT] Skyflow iframe fields are no longer visible in the DOM
[ASSERT] 'Place order' button is DISABLED (Skyflow onUnmounted called setCardDataInvalid; CyberSource not yet filled)
[ACT] Fill CyberSource card with '@td(CYBERSOURCE_VISA.number)'; fill '@td(CYBERSOURCE_VISA.expiry)'; fill '@td(CYBERSOURCE_VISA.cvv)'
[ACT] Click 'Place order'
[WAIT] Wait for order confirmation
[ASSERT] Order confirmation reached — payment processed via CyberSource (confirms no stale Skyflow processor routed the payment)
--- Switch direction 2: CyberSource → Skyflow (fresh cart) ---
[PRE:RESET_CART]
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart with fresh cart
[ACT] Select 'Bank card (CyberSource)'; fill all CS fields with valid data
[ACT] Switch to 'Bank card (Skyflow)'
[WAIT] Wait for Skyflow inline form to render
[ASSERT] CyberSource form fields are no longer visible
[ASSERT] Skyflow iframe fields are visible
[ASSERT] 'Place order' button is DISABLED (CyberSource onUnmounted called setCardDataInvalid; Skyflow not yet filled)
Assertions:
[DOM] After Skyflow→CS switch: CyberSource form renders; Skyflow form absent from DOM
[STATE] After Skyflow→CS switch: 'Place order' button disabled until CS fields filled; Skyflow onUnmounted cleanup confirmed fired
[STATE] After Skyflow→CS switch: CyberSource order succeeds with no cross-processor routing error
[DOM] After CS→Skyflow switch: Skyflow form renders; CyberSource form absent
[STATE] After CS→Skyflow switch: 'Place order' button disabled; CyberSource onUnmounted cleanup confirmed fired
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] No JS errors during either switch — no 'processor already registered' or stale-processor errors
[NETWORK] No duplicate payment-initialization requests fired during method switch
Failure_Signals: Stale Skyflow processor routes CyberSource payment (cross-processor routing — onUnmounted unregister not called); 'Place order' button stays enabled after switch (setCardDataInvalid not called — regression); JS TypeError on switch; wrong form persists after switch
Cleanup: Cancel CyberSource order via admin if placed during direction-1
References: VCST-5009; PR#2308 (onUnmounted in payment-processing-skyflow.vue + payment-processing-cyber-source.vue); Synced: VCST-5009 (2026-06-04)

Title: Skyflow - Processor Decline via CVV Mismatch (Cart-Embedded)
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
- Logged in as registered user
- Fresh cart with at least one item
- Skyflow configured with AllowCartPayment=true
- NOTE on decline mechanism: CVV 902 or 904 with canonical card triggers a PROCESSOR DECLINE (CVV-mismatch response code 65). This differs from vault-rejection (which occurs when a non-canonical card number is used). These are two distinct failure modes.
Test_Data: FRONT_URL={{FRONT_URL}}, USER_EMAIL={{USER_EMAIL}}, USER_PASSWORD={{USER_PASSWORD}}, sky_card=@td(SKYFLOW_MC.number), sky_exp=@td(SKYFLOW_MC.expiry), decline_cvv=902
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart; select a Delivery method (e.g. Fixed Rate Ground) so payment is the only remaining Place-order gate; select 'Bank card (Skyflow)'; if a 'Saved cards' dropdown is present choose 'Add new card'; wait for inline Skyflow form
[ACT] Fill 'Card number' iframe field with '@td(SKYFLOW_MC.number)' (canonical card — vault accepts it)
[ACT] Fill 'Expiration date' iframe field with '@td(SKYFLOW_MC.expiry)'
[ACT] Fill 'Security code' iframe field with '902' (decline-trigger CVV — CVV mismatch → processor declines; alternate: 904)
[WAIT] Wait for 'Place order' button to become enabled (card fields filled and syntactically valid)
[ACT] Click 'Place order'
[WAIT] Wait for payment processing response
[ASSERT] A decline error is surfaced to the user (message on /cart or redirect to /checkout/payment for order-context retry)
[ASSERT] Per live behavior: cart-flow decline pre-creates an order and routes user to /checkout/payment retry page (behavior #3 verified 2026-06-04)
[ASSERT] The order on /checkout/payment retry page has status indicating payment pending — NOT paid/completed
[WAIT] Wait ~3 minutes before retrying — Authorize.Net (the processor behind Skyflow) enforces a duplicate-transaction window; an immediate same-amount retry fails with 'A duplicate transaction has been submitted. (11)' E00027 (sandbox artifact, NOT a storefront bug; live-verified 2026-06-04)
[ACT] On retry page, fill '@td(SKYFLOW_MC.number)', '@td(SKYFLOW_MC.expiry)', and '@td(SKYFLOW_MC.cvv)' (CVV 900 — happy-path CVV)
[ACT] Submit retry payment
[WAIT] Wait for payment processing
[ASSERT] Retry succeeds — order confirmation or /checkout/completed shown
[ASSERT] Same order number as the pre-created order — NO new ghost order created by the retry
Assertions:
[STATE] Decline with CVV 902 surfaces an error to the user (processor-level decline, not vault rejection)
[NAV] After decline: user routed to /checkout/payment retry page with pre-created order (live-verified behavior)
[STATE] Order on retry page is the SAME order pre-created by the cart flow — no duplicate
[NAV] Retry with CVV 900 completes to order confirmation
[DOM] Order number on confirmation matches the pre-created order from the decline flow
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] authorizePayment returns isSuccess:false with errorMessage 'Your transaction was declined: This transaction has been declined. (65)' for CVV 902 (processor decline code 65 — not a 500; live-verified 2026-06-04, order CO260604-00009)
[CONSOLE] No unhandled JS exceptions on decline or retry
[NETWORK] No ghost orders — verify via /account/orders order count
Failure_Signals: Decline not surfaced to user (silent failure); 500 error on decline (safe-cast regression in ProcessPaymentAsync); duplicate orders created by retry; retry with CVV 900 fails (canonical card regression)
Cleanup: Cancel pre-created order via admin if retry fails; [PRE:RESET_CART]
References: VCST-5009; PR#23 (ProcessPaymentAsync safe-cast); BL-CHK-004; decline CVVs LIVE-VERIFIED 2026-06-04 (CVV 902 → decline code 65, retry CVV 900 → success, order CO260604-00009); Synced: VCST-5009 (2026-06-04)

Title: Skyflow - Decline (CVV 904) then Retry with Valid CVV Completes Same Order
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]

- Fresh cart with at least one item

The decline pre-creates an order and routes user to /checkout/payment retry page (live-verified behavior #3, 2026-06-04). CVV 902 is the alternate decline-trigger. This is the decline→retry→success loop case; PAY-SKY-013 is the pure-decline assertion case.

Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart; select a Delivery method (e.g. Fixed Rate Ground) so payment is the only remaining Place-order gate; select 'Bank card (Skyflow)'; if a 'Saved cards' dropdown is present choose 'Add new card'; wait for inline Skyflow form
[ACT] Fill 'Card number' iframe field with '@td(SKYFLOW_MC.number)'
[ACT] Fill 'Expiration date' iframe field with '@td(SKYFLOW_MC.expiry)'
[ACT] Fill 'Security code' iframe field with '904' (decline-trigger — CVV mismatch; alternate: 902)
[WAIT] Wait for 'Place order' button to become enabled
[ACT] Click 'Place order'
[WAIT] Wait for decline response
[ASSERT] Decline surfaced to user — error message or redirect occurs
[ASSERT] Per live behavior: cart-flow decline pre-creates an order and routes user to /checkout/payment retry page
[ACT] Note the order number shown on the /checkout/payment retry page
[WAIT] Wait ~3 minutes before retrying — Authorize.Net duplicate-transaction window blocks immediate same-amount retries with 'A duplicate transaction has been submitted. (11)' E00027; the window RESETS on each submit, so do not hammer (live-verified 2026-06-04: second round needed ~4 min total)
--- Retry with valid CVV ---
[ACT] On the /checkout/payment retry page, fill '@td(SKYFLOW_MC.number)' in card number field
[ACT] Fill '@td(SKYFLOW_MC.expiry)' in expiry field
[ACT] Fill '@td(SKYFLOW_MC.cvv)' in CVV field (CVV 900 — happy-path CVV; vault accepts)
[ACT] Click 'Pay now'
[WAIT] Wait for payment processing
[ASSERT] Payment succeeds — order confirmation or /checkout/completed displayed
[ASSERT] Order number on confirmation MATCHES the pre-created order from the decline step (same order, not a new one)
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders
[ASSERT] Order history shows exactly ONE new order from this session (no ghost/duplicate order)
Assertions:
[STATE] CVV 904 triggers processor decline (not vault rejection); decline is surfaced to user
[NAV] After decline: user routed to /checkout/payment retry page (live-verified behavior #3)
[DOM] Order number visible on retry page matches the pre-created order
[NAV] Retry with CVV 900 completes successfully — order confirmation shown
[STATE] Same order number on confirmation as on retry page — NO new duplicate order created
[STATE] /account/orders shows exactly one new order from this session
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] authorizePayment returns payment-failure for CVV 904 (processor decline — not a 500)
[CONSOLE] No unhandled JS exceptions on decline or retry
[NETWORK] No duplicate order creation calls — only one createOrderFromCart fired total
Failure_Signals: Decline not surfaced (silent failure); 500 error on decline (safe-cast regression); duplicate/ghost order created on retry; retry fails with valid CVV 900 AFTER the duplicate window has passed (an immediate-retry 'duplicate transaction (11)' failure is the known Authorize.Net sandbox artifact, NOT a bug); order number mismatch between retry page and confirmation
Cleanup: Cancel pre-created order via admin if retry fails; [PRE:RESET_CART]
References: VCST-5009; PR#23 (ProcessPaymentAsync safe-cast); BL-CHK-004; decline CVVs LIVE-VERIFIED 2026-06-04 (CVV 904 → decline code 65, retry CVV 900 after duplicate-window wait → same order CO260604-00010 completed); Synced: VCST-5009 (2026-06-04)

Title: Authorize.Net - Method Switch Guard: AN → Manual → Place Order Does Not Charge Card
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
- Logged in as registered user; fresh cart with ≥1 item (use a separate fresh cart — reuse risks stale payment rows)
- Authorize.Net AND at least one Manual/non-AllowCartPayment payment method both enabled (e.g. Wire Transfer or Purchase Order)
- IMPORTANT: This case validates the useCheckout.ts guard: finalizePayment only runs when paymentMethod.value?.allowCartPayment === true. Switching from AN (allowCartPayment=true) to a manual method (allowCartPayment=false or absent) MUST NOT trigger AN's Accept.js charge.
Test_Data: FRONT_URL={{FRONT_URL}}, USER_EMAIL={{USER_EMAIL}}, USER_PASSWORD={{USER_PASSWORD}}, an_card=@td(AUTHORIZENET_VISA.number), an_exp=@td(AUTHORIZENET_VISA.expiry), an_cvv=@td(AUTHORIZENET_VISA.cvv)
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart with fresh cart
[WAIT] Wait for payment methods section to render
[ACT] Select Authorize.Net payment method
[WAIT] Wait for inline Accept.js card form to render
[ACT] Fill the card number field with '@td(AUTHORIZENET_VISA.number)'
[ACT] Fill the expiration date field with '@td(AUTHORIZENET_VISA.expiry)'
[ACT] Fill the CVV/Security code field with '@td(AUTHORIZENET_VISA.cvv)'
[ASSERT] Card fields are filled; Accept.js form appears ready (card number visible/masked)
[ACT] Switch to the manual payment method (e.g. Wire Transfer or Purchase Order) by clicking its option
[WAIT] Wait for the AN card form to unmount/hide and the manual method UI to appear
[ASSERT] AN inline card form is no longer visible — the manual payment method section is now shown
[ASSERT] No payment authorization request is sent to Authorize.Net at this point (check Network tab — no POST to api2.authorize.net or /api/payment)
[ACT] Click 'Place order'
[WAIT] Wait for order creation response
[ASSERT] Order is created successfully with the manual payment method (NOT charged to the AN card)
[ASSERT] Order confirmation page is shown (or order appears in /account/orders with status pending/awaiting payment for manual method)
[ASSERT] No AN transaction appears in the network log during or after 'Place order' with manual method selected
Assertions:
[STATE] After switching from AN to manual method: AN form is unmounted and no longer in the active payment pipeline
[STATE] 'Place order' with manual method selected creates the order WITHOUT triggering Accept.js charge flow
[DOM] Order confirmation shown for manual method order
[STATE] /account/orders shows a new order with manual payment method — NOT paid/charged via AN
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] No POST to js.authorize.net, api2.authorize.net, or platform /api/payment during manual-method 'Place order' action
[API] createOrderFromCart — order created with manual payment method; no authorizePayment call to AN processor
[CONSOLE] No JS errors; no 'isActive' guard warning (payment-processing-authorize-net.vue unmount guard — if visible, it confirms the guard fired correctly but note it should be silently suppressed)
Failure_Signals: AN card charged after switching to manual method (useCheckout.ts allowCartPayment guard failed); stale AN processor fires on non-AN order submission; isActive guard missing — late async init after unmount registers processor and charges card; order created as AN-paid instead of manual-method pending
Cleanup: Cancel test order via admin if created; [PRE:RESET_CART]
References: VCST-5162 (useCheckout.ts allowCartPayment guard + payment-processing-authorize-net.vue isActive unmount guard); mirrors PAY-SKY-011 method-switch pattern; BL-PAY-004

Title: Authorize.Net - Accept.js Script Load Failure Does Not Strand User on /cart
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
- Logged in as registered user; fresh cart with ≥1 item
- Authorize.Net inline form attempted on /cart (AllowCartPayment=true, VCST-5162)
- SIMULATION: Block js.authorize.net in browser (Chrome DevTools Network → Block request URL pattern '*js.authorize.net*') to simulate CDN failure
- NOTE: This tests the isActive guard and graceful-degradation path — user should NOT be left on a blank/broken /cart with no way to proceed
Test_Data: FRONT_URL={{FRONT_URL}}, USER_EMAIL={{USER_EMAIL}}, USER_PASSWORD={{USER_PASSWORD}}
Steps:
[ACT] In Chrome DevTools Network tab, block the URL pattern '*js.authorize.net*' (or equivalent Accept.js CDN origin) to simulate script load failure
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart with fresh cart
[ACT] Select Authorize.Net payment method
[WAIT] Wait for the payment form area to resolve (load timeout expected)
[ASSERT] An error state is surfaced to the user — e.g. 'Payment method unavailable', an error message in the payment section, or the form area shows a graceful fallback
[ASSERT] The user is NOT stranded with a blank/empty payment section and no actionable message
[ASSERT] 'Place order' button is NOT enabled in this failure state (no form = no submission path)
[ASSERT] The storefront does not throw an unhandled JS exception (no blank white screen, no uncaught TypeError in console)
[ACT] Remove the block in DevTools and reload the page
[WAIT] Wait for Accept.js to load normally
[ASSERT] Authorize.Net payment form renders correctly after re-enabling the script

[STATE] 'Place order' disabled when payment form fails to load
[STATE] After unblocking: form renders normally — no permanent damage to checkout flow
[CONSOLE] No uncaught TypeError or unhandled promise rejection from payment-processing-authorize-net.vue on load failure
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] payment-processing-authorize-net.vue isActive guard fires during unmount sequence (expected — confirms guard prevents late-init registration after component is torn down)
[NETWORK] No payment POST sent during script-load-failure state
Failure_Signals: Blank /cart payment section with no error message (user stranded); unhandled TypeError in console from Accept.js undefined; 'Place order' enabled despite form load failure; white screen of death; page completely broken after script block
References: VCST-5162 (payment-processing-authorize-net.vue isActive guard); BL-PAY-004; CDN-failure pattern; ECL-5.2 (graceful degradation)

Title: Authorize.Net - GA4 Purchase Event Fires Exactly Once for Cart-Embedded Payment
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
- Logged in as registered user; fresh cart with ≥1 item
- GA4 dataLayer tracking enabled; Google Analytics connected
- IMPORTANT: GA4 purchase event for AN cart-payment is fired by useCheckout.ts (NOT by payment-processing-authorize-net.vue — the component explicitly skips the event, unlike CyberSource). This case validates the useCheckout.ts purchase event fires exactly once and payment-processing-authorize-net.vue does NOT double-fire.
- NOTE: Authorize.Net sandbox duplicate-transaction window (~3 min) applies — ensure no prior same-amount transaction in the window
Test_Data: FRONT_URL={{FRONT_URL}}, USER_EMAIL={{USER_EMAIL}}, USER_PASSWORD={{USER_PASSWORD}}, an_card=@td(AUTHORIZENET_VISA.number), an_exp=@td(AUTHORIZENET_VISA.expiry), an_cvv=@td(AUTHORIZENET_VISA.cvv)
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart with fresh cart and items
[ACT] Open Chrome DevTools Console; run: window._ga4_purchases = []; window.dataLayer.push = new Proxy(window.dataLayer.push, { apply(target, thisArg, args) { if (args[0]?.event === 'purchase') window._ga4_purchases.push(args[0]); return Reflect.apply(target, thisArg, args); } }); to intercept GA4 purchase events
[ACT] Select Authorize.Net payment method
[WAIT] Wait for inline Accept.js card form to render
[ACT] Fill card number '@td(AUTHORIZENET_VISA.number)', expiry '@td(AUTHORIZENET_VISA.expiry)', CVV '@td(AUTHORIZENET_VISA.cvv)'
[WAIT] Wait for 'Place order' to become enabled
[ACT] Click 'Place order'
[WAIT] Wait for order confirmation page
[ASSERT] Order confirmation is displayed
[ACT] In Chrome DevTools Console, run: window._ga4_purchases.length to count intercepted purchase events
[ASSERT] Exactly ONE purchase event was fired (window._ga4_purchases.length === 1)
[ASSERT] The purchase event transaction_id matches the order number shown on the confirmation page
[ASSERT] The purchase event value matches the cart total (from earlier page state)
[ASSERT] No second purchase event is present (payment-processing-authorize-net.vue correctly skips the event — useCheckout.ts is the sole firer)
Assertions:
[DOM] Order confirmation displayed after AN cart-embedded payment
[STATE] Exactly 1 purchase event in GA4 dataLayer (no duplicate from payment-processing-authorize-net.vue component)
[STATE] GA4 purchase event transaction_id matches confirmed order number
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] GA4/gtag.js event POST includes exactly one 'purchase' event type for this transaction
[CONSOLE] No unhandled JS errors during payment or dataLayer intercept
[CONSOLE] No second purchase push event from payment-processing-authorize-net.vue (component explicitly skips GA4 — verified in VCST-5162 implementation)
Failure_Signals: Two or more GA4 purchase events fired (double-fire regression — payment component AND checkout both fire); zero GA4 purchase events fired (useCheckout.ts GA4 guard broken); purchase event transaction_id does not match order number; purchase event value wrong
References: VCST-5162 (payment-processing-authorize-net.vue skips GA4; useCheckout.ts fires purchase event); mirrors GA-032 for Skyflow; GA4 no-double-fire pattern from VCST-5009; BL-PAY-004

Title: Authorize.Net - Multistep Checkout: Card Form on Billing Step Survives Unmount and Charges at Place Order
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
- Logged in as registered user; fresh cart with ≥1 item
- Authorize.Net configured with AllowCartPayment=true (VCST-5162)
- REQUIRES: checkout_multistep_enabled config flag = true (see storefront-config-flags.md $cfg.checkout_multistep_enabled). If the flag is OFF, /cart redirects away from /checkout/review — MARK CASE BLOCKED, NOT FAIL. Verify by navigating to {{FRONT_URL}}/checkout/review after adding to cart: if redirected back to /cart, the flag is off and this case cannot run.
- IMPORTANT: This case tests the onUnmounted survival path in payment-processing-authorize-net.vue (PR#2309). In multistep checkout the AN inline form lives on the Billing step and unmounts when the user proceeds to the Review step. The shared payment processor state + isCanFinalizePayment MUST survive unmount so finalizePayment fires correctly when Place Order is clicked on Review step. This is the same designed behavior as CyberSource in multistep mode.
- Valid test card: @td(AUTHORIZENET_VISA.number); expiry MM/YY mask (e.g., 12/29); AN sandbox duplicate-transaction window (~3 min) applies
Test_Data: FRONT_URL={{FRONT_URL}}, USER_EMAIL={{USER_EMAIL}}, USER_PASSWORD={{USER_PASSWORD}}, an_card=@td(AUTHORIZENET_VISA.number), an_exp=@td(AUTHORIZENET_VISA.expiry), an_cvv=@td(AUTHORIZENET_VISA.cvv)
Steps:
[PRE-CHECK] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/checkout/review after adding 1 item to cart — if the browser redirects away from /checkout/review back to /cart, checkout_multistep_enabled is OFF; STOP and mark case BLOCKED (not FAIL); do NOT proceed
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart with fresh cart containing ≥1 item
[WAIT] Wait for payment methods section to render
[ACT] Select Authorize.Net payment method
[WAIT] Wait for inline Accept.js card form to render on the cart/billing step
[ASSERT] URL remains on the cart or billing step — no premature redirect
--- BILLING STEP: fill AN card form ---
[ACT] Fill 'Card number' field with '@td(AUTHORIZENET_VISA.number)'
[ACT] Fill 'Expiration date' field with '@td(AUTHORIZENET_VISA.expiry)' (MM/YY mask)
[ACT] Fill 'CVV'/'Security code' field with '@td(AUTHORIZENET_VISA.cvv)'
[ACT] Fill cardholder name if required
[WAIT] Wait for 'Place order' or 'Proceed' / 'Continue' button to become enabled (all fields validly filled)
[ASSERT] Place order / Continue button is enabled — card state is valid
--- PROCEED TO REVIEW STEP: AN form unmounts ---
[ACT] Click 'Continue' or 'Proceed' to advance to the Review step ({{FRONT_URL}}/checkout/review)
[WAIT] Wait for the Review step page to load
[ASSERT] URL is {{FRONT_URL}}/checkout/review (multistep mode confirmed active)
[ASSERT] AN inline card form is NO LONGER visible on the Review step — it unmounted with the Billing step
[ASSERT] The Review step shows the order summary (items, shipping, total) and a 'Place order' button
[ASSERT] The 'Place order' button is ENABLED on the Review step — isCanFinalizePayment survived the Billing-step unmount (this is the core regression signal: if disabled, processor state was lost)
--- PLACE ORDER ON REVIEW STEP ---
[ACT] Click 'Place order' on the Review step
[WAIT] Wait for payment processing (finalizePayment calls Accept.js tokenization with the preserved card state, then charges via Authorize.Net)
[ASSERT] User navigates to order confirmation page — NOT stuck on /checkout/review, NOT redirected to /checkout/payment
[ASSERT] Order number is displayed on the confirmation page
[ASSERT] Cart is cleared (cart badge shows 0 or empty)
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders
[ASSERT] New order appears with Authorize.Net payment method and paid/authorized status — NOT in 'Payment Required' or pending-payment state
[ASSERT] Inspect window.dataLayer: exactly ONE purchase event fired (no duplicate from component + checkout double-fire)
Assertions:
[NAV] Multistep checkout flow: Billing step (AN form filled) → Review step (AN form unmounted) → Place Order → confirmation reached
[DOM] Order number visible on confirmation page
[STATE] AN card form absent on Review step (unmounted from Billing step)
[DOM] 'Place order' button ENABLED on Review step — processor + isCanFinalizePayment state survived unmount
[STATE] Cart cleared after successful order creation
[STATE] Order in /account/orders shows paid/authorized status via AN — NOT pending payment
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] createOrderFromCart mutation succeeds; errors[] empty
[CONSOLE] No JS errors during multistep flow; raw PAN '@td(AUTHORIZENET_VISA.number)' absent from all network request payloads (Accept.js tokenization preserved across unmount)
[NETWORK] No 5xx responses; no raw card data in POST bodies
Failure_Signals: Order created but in 'Payment Required' / unpaid state (CRITICAL: processor state lost on Billing-step unmount — onUnmounted guard failed; finalizePayment never called); 'Place order' button on Review step is disabled (isCanFinalizePayment reset to false on unmount — core regression); checkout stuck on /checkout/review after Place Order; double GA4 purchase event; redirect to /checkout/payment after Place Order on Review step (old non-multistep flow regression); BLOCKED verdict if checkout_multistep_enabled flag is off
Cleanup: Cancel test order via admin if created; [PRE:RESET_CART]
References: VCST-5162 (PR#2309 payment-processing-authorize-net.vue onUnmounted survival path — same design as CyberSource in multistep); storefront-config-flags.md checkout_multistep_enabled; project memory project_checkout_multistep_gate.md; mirrors CyberSource multistep behavior; BL-PAY-004; BL-CHK-004
